items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
[New] GG Marmont Series Mini Handbag. The GG Marmont series interprets classic colors with a new silhouette, showcasing early autumn charm. This handbag is crafted from Gucci Beige (Rosso Ancora) quilted V-shaped leather, featuring a detachable light gold-tone chain strap with a removable buckle. Magnetic flap closure with double G accents. Gucci Beige (Rosso Ancora) quilted V-shaped leather, Gucci Beige (Rosso Ancora) leather trim, light gold-tone accessories.
Model: 811238.
Size: 17✖️13✖️6cm.
Color: Beige/Original Leather.

items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
[New] 👉 GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
This GG Marmont ultra mini bag is crafted from quilted V-shaped leather in a refined beige tone, adding a bright new piece to the 2025 Early Spring collection. The item features the series' iconic double G motif, a vintage 1970s symbol that has become a classic element of the brand. Beige quilted V-shaped leather, light gold-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, comes with a keychain that can be connected separately, double G, chain shoulder strap (60cm high), Weight: approx. 0.35kg
Model: 476433.
Size: 16.5(L)x 10(W)x 4.5cm(T)
Color: Beige Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model Height: 176cm
Fits: iPhone Pro, card holder, and lipstick

items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
Original Leather [New] GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette and neutral beige quilted V-shaped leather. The bag is slightly structured with a flap closure and double G accessories. It offers versatile carrying styles, easily switching between shoulder and handbag by sliding the metal chain. Beige quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, double G, chain strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also works as a crossbody. Spring buckle flap, Weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Size: 22(W)x 13(H)x 6cm(D)
Color: Beige Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick

items.name_en: 🌷《With full original green box packaging》🌷Children's Rabbit Print Tote Bag. The 2024 Early Spring Children's Collection ingeniously blends circular interlocking double-G and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting the tailored style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in various colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci rabbit print, cleverly incorporating a red contrasting trim. Multi-colored Supreme canvas, red Supreme canvas trim, Gucci rabbit print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: 🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Mini Shoulder Bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 bag, inspired by the brand's equestrian heritage with its double ring and long strip design. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas with a unique heat-pressed pattern for a soft and refined touch.
Exclusive to Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Interior: 1 main compartment
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Italian creation
Model: 815205
Dimensions: 20(L) x 14.5(W) x 5.1cm(H)
Color: White PVC / Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 🌷Includes original green box packaging🌷【New Arrival】GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
🌷Includes original green box packaging🌷【New Arrival】GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
From mirror leather to sparkling crystals, Gucci celebrates the gifting season with dazzling pieces. Choose printed accessories or glossy leather wallets to inject vitality into your look. This GG Marmont Ultra Mini bag is crafted with silver metallic leather. Silver metallic V-shaped leather, silver-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, includes key charm that can be attached separately, double-G, chain shoulder strap (60cm long), weight: approx. 0.35kg
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, card holder, and lipstick
Model: 476433
Dimensions: 16.5(L) x 10(H) x 4.5cm(D)
Color: Silver full leather/Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 🌷Style 735145. The new GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not just be trendy for a season, but timeless. This Ophidia series small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas with double G hardware.

Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 bag under the vision of Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, interpreting the double ring and rectangular design that inherits the brand's equestrian roots. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas, featuring a unique heat-pressed pattern for a soft and exquisite touch.

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】GG Marmont Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】GG Marmont Mini Bag
From mirror leather to sparkling crystals, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with dazzling pieces. Choose printed accessories or glossy leather wallets to inject vitality into your look. This GG Marmont ultra-mini bag is crafted in silver metallic leather. Silver metallic V-shaped leather, silver-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, comes with a keychain that can be attached separately to the bag, double-G, chain shoulder strap (60cm high), weight: approx. 0.35kg
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods headphones, card holder and lipstick
Model: 446744.
Size: 22(L) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Silver full leather/Original leather.
Italian creation
